title: cuphea micrantha
intro: Cuphea micrantha, also known as the smallflower cuphea or Mexican heather, is a flowering plant native to Central America and Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Cuphea micrantha include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds and flu. Cuphea micrantha can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can be dried and used in herbal blends.
